comment: GUIDE PURPOSE: Coding Standards and Clean Code Discipline regarding file line limits, component reusability, modular styling, navigation conventions, and accessibility baselines

rules.title: Strict File Size Constraints
rules.requirement: Limit code lengths to ensure readability and simplify modular edits

rules.title: Dry Component Reuse
rules.requirement: Build elements once and import them globally. Never duplicate UI blocks
rules.mechanism: Scaffold primitives in /components/ui/ and configure visual variations using explicit props instead of duplicating files

rules.title: Modular CSS Styling Rules
rules.requirement: Use CSS Modules for local component styling
rules.mechanism: Avoid inline style attributes. Leverage global CSS variables in globals.css for design tokens. Write responsive layouts using mobile first media queries

rules.title: Accessibility Baseline
rules.requirement: All pages must support assistive technologies
rules.mechanism: Ensure full keyboard navigability. Provide alt tags on images and label elements for input fields. Maintain WCAG AA contrast (min 4.5:1 ratio). Use semantic HTML5 layout tags

rules.title: Graceful Error Handling
rules.requirement: Never crash the frontend or expose database error messages to users
rules.mechanism: Wrap async actions in try/catch blocks. Display friendly error panels with distinct icons and Retry actions

rules.title: Context Aware Back Navigation
rules.requirement: Browser back buttons must return the user to the correct search/visualizer context rather than resetting state
rules.mechanism: Append source page params to detail URLs and dynamically direct back routing paths matching the query param instead of statically routing home

rules.title: Touch Target Accessibility Baseline
rules.requirement: All interactive elements must be easy to tap on mobile devices
rules.mechanism: Enforce a minimum touch target size of 44x44px (or 48x48px) for buttons, menu triggers, and input fields on mobile layouts to prevent accidental clicks

rules.title: Collapsible Mobile Structural Elements
rules.requirement: Conserve mobile screen real estate and reduce scroll fatigue on small viewports
rules.mechanism: Group flat link categories into touch expandable accordions or slide out menu lists triggered by a mobile hamburger button

rules.title: Mobile First CSS Architecture
rules.requirement: Write default styles for small viewports and scale up for larger devices
rules.mechanism: Write basic elements layout styles without media queries so they target mobile screens, then add overrides for desktop layouts inside minimum width media queries (for example targeting 768px)

rules.title: Responsive Sizing and Box Model Constraints
rules.requirement: Ensure component widths respond dynamically to narrow viewports without triggering horizontal layout overflows
rules.mechanism: Enforce box sizing: border box globally. Replace fixed pixel widths with maximum width 100% or relative dimensions like percentages and viewport width units on layout containers

rules.title: Touch Only Hover Style Isolation
rules.requirement: Prevent visual stickiness or double tap requirement issues on touch screens
rules.mechanism: Wrap all pointer hover styling classes inside hover media queries so they only evaluate on mouse enabled interfaces
